creator: Lena@lena.kiev.ua
text: The video chip GeForce 6150 on my motherboard was supported by x11/nvidia-driver-304, but not anymore. I had to switch from nvidia to nv and from i386 to amd64. I use KOI8-R/KOI8-U locale (as was standard for Russian and Ukrainian when I switched from MS-DOS to FreeBSD) instead of UTF-8. editors/aee doesn't support Unicode, and to distinguish text files from binary files for migration to Unicode is quite non-trivial and error-prone. VT requires Unicode locale. I use 11 virtual SC consoles for everything text, including email (mail/mutt). You want to move everything into X, I don't. Don't force everybody to do everything exactly same as you do.
